retry_reason: kref_put is unconditional and never fails; if the reference count reaches zero, the object is freed and retrying would be a use-after-free.
contract_summary: Release-wrapper: decrements the reference count of the pbl pool embedded in rdev. If the count reaches zero, the pool is destroyed via destroy_pblpool. After calling this function, the caller must not use the rdev object again (or must ensure another reference still exists). This is a one-way release operation — it never fails and does not require checking a return value.
